author: y4rr
content: Landed full Llama 3 8B inference stack in 10 commits (d50ec9f1..b31366aa): #505 GQA, #506 KVCache GQA, #507 sharded safetensors, #508 HF config, #510 tokenizers, #512 LlamaForCausalLM, #513 end-to-end smoke, plus #514 native bf16, #515 RoPE NTK/YARN, #517 clippy. Real Meta-Llama-3-8B weights load (16GB, 291 tensors in 24s) and a 6-token prefill through all 32 layers runs in 41s producing a valid vocab-range token. Output coherence limited by bf16 accumulator in generic kernels — mixed-precision is the next follow-up. ferrotorch-paged CPU scaffold was deleted earlier in session per user feedback; real paging work awaits a fresh start once mixed-precision is in.
